g.text: Videos + websites. Move fast through familiar stuff, slow down where fuzzy.
Resources: Jacob Sorber · CS50 (weeks 1–5) · Low Level Learning · Compiler Explorer
Tie concepts directly to your work. Daily job and study will reinforce each other.
Resources: Jacob Sorber · FreeRTOS source · Compiler Explorer · your own work codebase
Implement everything from scratch in C. Slow and deliberate beats fast and forgettable.
Resources: Exercism.io (C track) · LeetCode (C, easy) · GeeksForGeeks for concept lookup
C++ builds the vocabulary. Rust is the destination. Most time goes to Rust.
Resources: learncpp.com · The Rust Book (free) · Rustlings · embedded-hal docs

svg.text: Weekdays: 1–1.5 hrs · Weekends: review only · Shift phases forward anytime — no guilt
